nodes.label: Neo4j / FalkorDB Cypher Export
nodes.rationale: Uses MERGE so re-runs never create duplicates; FalkorDB prefers direct push because GRAPH.QUERY runs one statement at a time with no bulk script import

nodes.label: Token Reduction Benchmark
nodes.rationale: Only run when total_words > 5000 - for small corpora the graph's value is structural clarity, not token compression
